## Problem

<!-- What is the user-facing problem or need? -->

<!-- How should rs-f4ss behave? What would the CLI / config / API look like? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider? Why is this one better? -->

## Use case

<!-- Tell us about your scenario. The richer the context, the easier it is to prioritize. -->

- Who would use this?
- How often?
- What's the impact of not having it (workaround cost)?

## Mockup / examples

<!-- If you have a CLI sketch, config snippet, or example output, drop it here. -->

```bash
# Example invocation
rs-f4ss ...
```

- [ ] I'd be willing to help test
